title: Informational Interviews and Reality Testing · Claim Audit: Contact Context
summary: A candidate schedules a conversation to ask for a hidden referral, asks generic questions available online, records without consent, and treats one opinion as market truth. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the contact context increment in consented role-reality interview study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Research public context and explain why this person may have relevant perspective without presuming identity, availability, or representation.
Define a concrete uncertainty about tasks, environment, entry routes, evidence, or tradeoffs that a practitioner can help test.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Contact Context · Theory Contact Context
steps.instruction:
theory case — A nominal learning conversation hides a referral request, asks generic questions, records without consent, and generalizes one practitioner view to a whole market. The theory variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Research public context and explain why this person may have relevant perspective without presuming identity, availability, or representation.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A nominal learning conversation hides a referral request, asks generic questions, records without consent, and generalizes one practitioner view to a whole market. The worked example variation 2 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Research public context and explain why this person may have relevant perspective without presuming identity, availability, or representation. A defensible solution applies Contact Context, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to consented role-reality interview study.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-5
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A prestigious title guarantees applicable advice. This fails the Contact Context contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG 2.2 Recommendation; ISO IEC 40500:2025) — Controls accessible portfolio and application artifacts while distinguishing automated checks from knowledgeable human and assistive-technology evaluation.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Research public context and explain why this person may have relevant perspective without presuming identity, availability, or representation.
